description: Comparison flow using claudeTask — compare latency/quality

parameters.name: timePeriod
parameters.description: Time period for the chart (e.g., 'this month', 'this week')

parameters.goal: Find the most popular K-pop song ${timePeriod}. Search for current K-pop charts and identify the #1 song. Return a JSON object with 'trackName' (song title) and 'artist' (artist name) fields.

grammarPatterns: claude play the most popular kpop song $(timePeriod:wildcard)
claude play the top kpop song $(timePeriod:wildcard)
claude get the most popular kpop song $(timePeriod:wildcard) and play it
claude find the hottest kpop song $(timePeriod:wildcard) and play it
claude play the number one kpop song $(timePeriod:wildcard)
